goal: Build a tactile-feedback insertion task: Franka inserts peg into hole using TacEx (tactile sensor) for last-cm contact-aware adjustment. Realizes Phase 10 yrkesroll #19 (haptics / contact-rich research persona).
thoughts: TacEx = NVIDIA's tactile-sensor research framework. Integrates with Franka panda_hand to emit per-fingertip pressure map.
Pattern: pick peg → approach hole → use tactile feedback during last 1cm to align.
Without TacEx live, fall back to FT sensor + slow-approach trajectory.
Function-gate: peg ends in HolePanel xy + above_floor (same as CP-58).
Single-peg variant of CP-58 with tactile twist.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Peg_1", prim_type="Cylinder", position=[0.4, 0.2, 0.835], radius=0.018, height=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Peg_1", schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/HolePanel", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.20, 0.15, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/HolePanel", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/Franka/FtSensor",
    parent_path="/World/Franka/panda_hand",
    threshold=2.0,
)

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.2, 0.835], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Peg_1", "/World/HolePanel"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=["/World/Peg_1"],
    destination_path="/World/HolePanel",
    drop_target=[0, -0.4, 0.81],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/HolePanel"],
)
extension_notes: Tactile-research canonical. TacEx integration is research-tier (not yet wired in tool_executor). Falls back to FT sensor + slow approach trajectory.
failure_modes: TacEx framework not available — fallback to FT-only
Peg drops with 4mm+ lateral error from drop_target — usual peg-in-hole physics issue
Slow approach trajectory may not be triggered without contact-aware controller mode
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-10; build OK, gate stable_fail (PhysX numerical instability during grip — cube velocity blows to >200km/s)
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cylinder", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, radius=0.018, height=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)

create_prim(prim_path={{hole_panel.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{hole_panel.position}}, scale={{hole_panel.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{hole_panel.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_force_torque_sensor(
    sensor_path={{ft_sensor.path}},
    parent_path={{ft_sensor.parent_path}},
    threshold={{ft_sensor.threshold}},
)

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{hole_panel.path}}],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}],
    destination_path={{hole_panel.path}},
    drop_target=[0, -0.4, 0.81],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{hole_panel.path}}],
)
